Class ValidationService

java.lang.Object
martin.viewtool.core.ValidationService
public final class ValidationService extends Object
Utility class with validation methods.
Author:
cesar

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    requireHasText(String s, String field)
    Throws IllegalArgumentException if the string is null or blank.
    static String
    requireValidLimit(String userInput)
    Validates a download speed limit value.
    static URI
    requireValidUrl(String raw)
    Parses and validates a URL string.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • requireHasText

      public static void requireHasText(String s, String field)
      Throws IllegalArgumentException if the string is null or blank.
      Parameters:
      s - value to check
      field - field name used in the error message

    • requireValidUrl

      public static URI requireValidUrl(String raw)
      Parses and validates a URL string.
      Parameters:
      raw - raw URL string to validate
      Returns:
      the parsed URI
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the string is not a valid URL

    • requireValidLimit

      public static String requireValidLimit(String userInput)
      Validates a download speed limit value.
      Parameters:
      userInput - raw input string
      Returns:
      normalised limit string, or null if no limit
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the input contains non-digit characters
